title: Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China for high-stakes talks with Xi
summary_full: The US president says his first request to Xi would be to  "open up" China, while Beijing is expected to press Trump on the status of Taiwan.
summary_public: The US president says his first request to Xi would be to  "open up" China, while Beijing is expected to press Trump on the status of Taiwan.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China
